entries.definition:
كتاب الثاء

ثفي - ثفر

(ثقف) الثاء والقاف والفاء كلمة واحدة إليها يرجع الفروع، وهو إقامة دَرْءِ الشيء. ويقال ثَقَّفْتُ القناةَ إذا أقَمْتَ عِوَجَها. قال:

th–q–f to straighten, to put into the correct shape; a capable
person; to locate, to catch, to overcome, to dispute. Of this root,
two forms occur six times in the Qur’an: ثَقِفَ thaqifa four times
and ثُقِفَ thuqifa twice.

ثَقِفَ thaqifa a [v. trans.] to catch, to overtake, to come upon, to
overcome, to gain the upper hand (60:2) إِنْ يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا لَكُمْ أَعْدَاءً if
they gain the upper hand over you, they will revert to being your
enemies.

ثُقِفَ thuqifa [pass.] to be found, to be overtaken, to be
overcome, to be caught (33:61) مَلْعُونِينَ أَيْنَمَا ثُقِفُوا أُخِذُوا وَقُتِّلُوا تَقْتِيلًا
accursed, wherever they are found, they will be seized and
[fiercely] slain.
